nasb.text: Then Esau ran to meet him and embraced him, and fell on his neck and kissed him, and they wept.

esv.text: But Esau ran to meet him and embraced him and fell on his neck and kissed him, and they wept.

cnv.text: 以掃跑來迎接他，擁抱他，伏在他頸項上，與他親吻；兩個人都哭了。

ccb.text: 以扫见到雅各，就跑上去拥抱他，亲吻他，二人抱头痛哭。

csbs.text: 以扫跑来迎接他，拥抱他，伏在他的脖子上亲吻他；他们两人都哭了。
